description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean lines, characterized by a mix of white and pink exterior walls. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a double door, flanked by a small porch area and landscaped greenery, including a tree and shrubs. Large windows are present on the upper level, providing ample natural light, while the lower level has smaller, more private windows. The rear of the house showcases a wide wooden slatted feature, likely covering a patio or large window, and a balcony above. The side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure is compact yet spacious, with a clear emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white and pink walls, landscaped front yard, and large windows. The design features clean lines, a recessed entryway, and a wooden accent at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, porch, landscaped yard, and upper balcony with large windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the solid white wall with minimal windows and a small door, plus visible landscaping at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a wide wooden slatted feature, pink upper walls, and a balcony above a covered area.
description_view_3: Right side view displays a mostly solid white wall with a few windows and the landscaped front yard extending to the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large upper windows and smaller lower windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed double door entry with small porch, steps, and landscaped flanking greenery
